properties.displayName: ptracesyscall or gdb invocation detected in syslogauditd
properties.description: Detect Linux host events indicating ptrace usage, gdb invocation, or auditd syscall logs for ptrace (possible debugger detection/evasion behavior). Monitors syslog/auditd messages for ptrace/gdb/strace/gcore related activity.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "syscall=101" or Message|contains has "ptrace(" or Message|contains has "PTRACE_ATTACH") and (Message|contains has "gdb" or Message|contains has "gdbserver" or Message|contains has "gcore") and (Message|contains has "strace")
